name: the empty-safe array expansion does not trip set -u when the array is empty (the bash 3.2 failure mode)
command: bash -c 'set -uo pipefail; ra=(); toa=(); printf "%s\n" ok ${ra[@]+"${ra[@]}"} ${toa[@]+"${toa[@]}"}' 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && ! grep -q 'unbound' e.txt && echo pattern-set-u-safe 1>&2
